content.text:
TASK: Redesign tire listing page to match wheels listing page quality

CONTEXT:
You're updating the tire listing page at C:\Users\Scott-Pc\clawd\warehouse-tire-site\src\app\tires\page.tsx

The wheels page (C:\Users\Scott-Pc\clawd\warehouse-tire-site\src\app\wheels\page.tsx) is the reference standard.

KEY CHANGES NEEDED:

1. ADD TOP PICKS SECTION (like wheels page)
   - Title: "Top Tire Picks for Your {year} {make} {model}"
   - Subtitle: "Hand-picked based on fitment, value, and popularity"
   - Score tires by: price sweet spot ($80-$200), brand reputation, stock availability
   - Show 4-8 curated picks in a distinct container
   - Only show on page 1

2. ADD TRUST/INSTALL STRIP (copy from wheels page)
   - Green banner with checkmarks
   - "Ship to your installer", "Local installation available", "Mount & balance included"
   - "No guesswork — guaranteed fitment"

3. ADD PACKAGE CONTEXT BANNER
   - When user came from wheel selection (wheelSku param exists)
   - Show: "Building your package: Wheels selected ✓ Now choose matching tires"
   - Maybe show small package summary with wheel info

4. IMPROVE SIZE SELECTION UX
   - Instead of raw size buttons, add guidance labels
   - Group sizes: "Stock Sizes" (tireSizesStrict) vs "Optional Upgrades" (tireSizesAgg)
   - Add brief description: "215/65R16 — Stock size, best ride comfort"

5. IMPROVE TIRE CARDS
   - Add fitment confirmation message: "Fits your {year} {make} {model}"
   - Better CTA: "View Details" or "Quick Add"
   - Show badges consistently (terrain type, speed rating)

6. VISUAL CONSISTENCY
   - Use same section headers style as wheels
   - Same spacing and card structure
   - Same filter sidebar styling

REFERENCE FILES:
- Wheels page: C:\Users\Scott-Pc\clawd\warehouse-tire-site\src\app\wheels\page.tsx
- Current tires page: C:\Users\Scott-Pc\clawd\warehouse-tire-site\src\app\tires\page.tsx

BUILD & TEST:
After changes, run: cd C:\Users\Scott-Pc\clawd\warehouse-tire-site && npm run build
Then git commit with message: "feat: redesign tire listing page to match wheels page quality"
Then git push

Report back what you changed and any issues encountered.
